zh.lifeSummary: 當John Sharp III於1573年出生在蘇格蘭可拉可曼南史爾可拉可曼南時，他的父親John Sharp II18歲，母親Janet Cusing23歲。他於1598年8月15日與Agnes Wilson在英國蘇格蘭可拉可曼南史爾可拉可曼南結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1616年9月16日在他的家鄉享年43歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭可拉可曼南史爾可拉可曼南。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Sharp III于1573年出生在苏格兰可拉可曼南史爾可拉可曼南时，他的父亲John Sharp II18岁，母亲Janet Cusing23岁。他于1598年8月15日与Agnes Wilson在英国苏格兰可拉可曼南史爾可拉可曼南结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1616年9月16日在他的家乡享年43岁，埋葬在苏格兰可拉可曼南史爾可拉可曼南。

nameMeanings.name: Sharp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname from Middle English sharp(e) ‘sharp, quick, smart, acute, keen-witted’ (Old English scearp).
Irish: when not the English or Scots name in 1 above, an Anglicized (part translated) form of Gaelic Ó Géaráin ‘descendant of Géarán’, a personal name based on a diminutive of géar ‘sharp’.
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Scharf   ‘sharp-cutting’ or of any of several other European names with similar meaning.

variants.name: Sharps
meanings: English (Cheshire): variant of Sharp , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Scharf
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Erwin, Gerhardt, Kurt, Uwe, Frieda, Fritz, Grete, Helmuth, Horst, Juergen, Klaus.

South German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for an energetic, active person, from Middle High German scharf, scharpf and German scharf ‘sharp-cutting’. For Jews, it can also come from the Yiddish adjective sharf, with the same meaning. Compare Sarff , Sharf , and Sharp .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Sharp III was born in 1573, in Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scotland, his father, John Sharp II, was 18 and his mother, Janet Cusing, was 23. He married Agnes Wilson on 15 August 1598, in Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 16 September 1616, in his hometown, at the age of 43, and was buried in Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Sharp III est né en 1573, à Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Écosse, son père, John Sharp II, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Janet Cusing, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Wilson le 15 août 1598, à Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 16 septembre 1616, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Sharp III 1573 in Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Sharp II 18 und seine Mutter Janet Cusing 23. Er hat am 15. August 1598 in Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Agnes Wilson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 16. September 1616 im Alter von 43 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Sharp III è nato il nel 1573 nel Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scotland, il suo padre, John Sharp II, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Janet Cusing, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Wilson il 15 agosto 1598, nel Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 16 settembre 1616, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: John Sharp IIIが1573年にスコットランドクラクマナンシュアイアクラクマナンで生まれた時，父John Sharp IIは18歳，母Janet Cusingは23歳であった。1598年8月15日にイギリススコットランドクラクマナンシュアイアクラクマナンでAgnes Wilsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1616年9月16日に故郷で43歳で死去し，スコットランドクラクマナンシュアイアクラクマナンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Sharp III(이)가 1573년 스컷랜드 클랙먼아실르 클랙먼아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Sharp II(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Cusing(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1598년 8월 15일 영국 스코틀랜드 클랙먼아실르 클랙먼아에서 Agnes Wilson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1616년 9월 16일 그의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 클랙먼아실르 클랙먼아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Sharp III nasceu em 1573, em Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Sharp II, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Janet Cusing, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Wilson em 15 de agosto de 1598, em Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de setembro de 1616, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Sharp III родился в 1573 г. в местности клаккманнан, клаккманнаньшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Sharp II было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Cusing, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Wilson 15 августа 1598 г. в местности клаккманнан, клаккманнаньшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 16 сентября 1616 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности клаккманнан, клаккманнаньшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Sharp III nació en 1573, en Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scotland, su papá, John Sharp II, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Janet Cusing, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Agnes Wilson el 15 de agosto de 1598, en Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 16 de septiembre de 1616, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Clackmannan, Clackmannanshire, Scotland.
